layout.spacing_system: Dense and compact. p-4 or p-6 for widgets.
layout.surface_treatment: Grid Borders: expose the skeleton. border-collapse style layout. Use sharp edges (rounded-none or max rounded-sm). No soft shadows, rely on 1px borders.

components.search_bar: Minimalist input. No generic rounded backgrounds. Use a transparent background with a solid 1px bottom border (`border-b border-border`). Focus state should illuminate the bottom border with the accent color (`focus:border-accent focus:ring-0`).
components.time_selector: Segmented control with sharp edges (`rounded-none`). Inactive items are muted text (`text-neutral-500`). Active item gets an accent underline or a subtle surface background with bright accent text (`text-accent bg-surface`).
components.metric_cards: Cardless or flat geometric containers (`border border-[#222222] bg-[#0F0F0F] rounded-none p-4 or p-6`). Large monospace data values. Overline label placed above the value.
components.chart: Recharts LineChart. Hide outer axes lines if possible, keep a subtle horizontal grid (`strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="#1A1A1A"`). The line itself must use the accent color (`#00E5C0`) with a solid stroke. Tooltip must be an optical clarity glassmorphic box (`backdrop-blur-md bg-black/80 border border-white/10`).
components.loading_states: Sharp pulsating borders or minimalist ASCII loaders. Avoid standard generic spinners. Display skeleton rectangles with a very dark subtle pulse (`animate-pulse bg-[#1A1A1A]`).
components.error_states: Use red danger text (`#FF3B30`) rendered in monospace font, acting like a terminal error output.

motion.transitions: Minimal and precise. Use `transition-all duration-150 ease-out`.
motion.hover: Interactive text shifts to accent color (`hover:text-accent`). Widgets might get a subtle border highlight (`hover:border-white/30`).

testing.attributes: CRITICAL: All interactive elements, including search inputs, selector buttons, metric cards, and error boundaries, MUST use a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='ticker-search-input'`, `data-testid='time-selector-1y'`).

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use standard Shadcn card components with generic rounded corners and drop shadows. Override these styles to `rounded-none`, `shadow-none`, and `bg-[#0F0F0F]`.
Implement the layout as a 'Control Room Grid', meaning every widget must stretch to fill its grid area (`h-full`), maintaining visual density and alignment.

For the UI, pair IBM Plex Sans (or Inter if unavailable, though IBM Plex is preferred) for headings/labels, with JetBrains Mono for all numeric data. This gives the application a professional trading terminal aesthetic.
Ensure Recharts components are responsive and match the exact color tokens provided in the palette (backgrounds must be completely transparent to inherit the parent widget's color).
Strictly adhere to the dark mode requirement with the requested 'verde acqua' (Teal/Aqua: #00E5C0) only used functionally (e.g., chart lines, active states, key metric highlights).
